---
title: "Contatti"
lang: it
---

## Contatti

**Dott.ssa Vilane Gonçalves Sales**
Ricercatrice Post-Dottorato
Leibniz Centre for Tropical Marine Research (ZMT)
Fahrenheitstraße 6, 28359 Brema, Germania

**Email:** [vilane.goncalves.sales@leibniz-zmt.de](mailto:vilane.goncalves.sales@leibniz-zmt.de)

## Profili Online

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mL2jpAsAAAAJ)
- [ORCID: 0000-0003-0627-0872](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0627-0872)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Vilane-Sales)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vilanegsales/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vgs549)

## Pagina Istituzionale

- [Profilo ZMT](https://www.leibniz-zmt.de/)
